audit_items.proof_trace: Every `gp->member` sds is either transferred to `addReplyBulkSds` (which calls `sdsfree` internally via `addReplySds`, networking.c:330) or to `zslInsert` (ownership transfer), and `gp->member` is immediately set to NULL in both paths (geo.c L619, L655) before `geoArrayFree` is called. `geoArrayFree` then calls `sdsfree(NULL)` on consumed slots—confirmed safe by sds.c:166—and `sdsfree(valid_ptr)` on any unclaimed members. `zfree(NULL)` in `geoArrayFree` is also a no-op (zmalloc.c:196). No stale geoPoint pointers survive a `geoArrayAppend` realloc.
